mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate drops below 8.0 percent, it signals a labor market inflection that boosts consumer confidence and aggregate demand expectations, driving immediate positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in more than 55% of instances where UNRATE crosses below 8.0.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous quarterly expansion in real GDP and monthly growth in housing starts amplifies business investment cycles, creating a compounding positive effect on corporate profit margins that lifts S&P 500 returns over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces a negative or zero directional accuracy below 50% over a 3-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: An expanding industrial production index indicates rising capacity utilization and supply-side efficiency gains, which lower input cost inflation and support equity valuations, yielding positive S&P 500 returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show no statistically significant difference between high and low INDPRO growth regimes (t-test p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the CPI exceeding 0.4 percent triggers immediate repricing of inflation expectations and fears of premature monetary tightening, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 5-day returns in over 60% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds the 0.4% threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in retail and food services sales reflects underlying consumer spending momentum, which directly translates into higher corporate revenue forecasts and positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC for RSAFS growth rates remains below 0.02 across all rolling 12-month windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent rises in total nonfarm payrolls and declines in the unemployment rate validate a self-reinforcing employment cycle, reducing wage-price spiral risks while boosting aggregate demand, thereby driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to outperform a random baseline in out-of-sample walk-forward testing over two full market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of constrained housing supply, any positive shock to housing starts rapidly clears inventory bottlenecks, accelerating construction-related corporate earnings and producing immediate positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no significant positive skew when HOUST rises above its 12-month moving average during supply-constrained quarters.
